name: new york cheesecake
instructions: crust: blitz 1.5 cups graham crackers, mix with 5 tbsp melted butter and 2 tbsp sugar, press into a 9-inch springform, bake 10 min at 350. filling: beat 2 lb cream cheese (room temp) with 1.25 cups sugar until smooth. add 1/2 cup sour cream, 2 tsp vanilla, splash of lemon juice. add 4 eggs + 1 yolk one at a time, low speed (don't whip in air). pour over crust. bake at 325 in a water bath ~60-70 min — center should jiggle slightly. cool slowly (door cracked), chill overnight.
notes: low and slow, water bath, no air whipped into the eggs — these prevent cracks. heavy cream can sub for sour cream.
